backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile management, subject/chapter CRUD operations, study time tracking, and access control with authorization checks for all operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features: pause/resume timer functionality, per-chapter time tracking, and motivational quote display component.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and utilities for the Tracky study tracking application.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives defining OKLCH-based color system variables for light and dark modes with warm earth tones.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the Tracky application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component with TanStack Router configuration, protected route logic, authentication checks, and automatic profile setup redirection.
frontend/src/components/ChapterList.tsx: Chapter list component displaying incomplete and completed chapters with checkboxes for status toggling, chapter selection for timer tracking, and study time display.
frontend/src/components/ChapterStatsCard: Dashboard card component showing completed and pending chapter counts with color-coded icons and total chapter summary.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with header, navigation (Dashboard, Subjects, Syllabus Tracker), user profile display, and logout functionality. Includes responsive mobile navigation and uses Internet Identity for authentication.
frontend/src/components/MotivationalQuot: Displays a daily motivational quote selected based on the day of year from a predefined list of 20 educational and motivational quotes. Renders in a styled card with a quote icon.
frontend/src/components/ProgressCard.tsx: Card component displaying overall progress percentage across all subjects with a progress bar and trending icon.
frontend/src/components/ProgressReport.t: Comprehensive progress report card showing total subjects, total/completed/pending chapters, and overall completion percentage with visual progress bar. Fetches data from multiple query hooks.
frontend/src/components/StudyGoalCard.ts: Card for setting and tracking daily study goals in minutes, showing progress toward the goal with a progress bar and celebration message when reached. Uses query hooks for goal and study time data.
frontend/src/components/StudyTimeCard.ts: Simple card displaying total accumulated study time across all subjects in formatted hours and minutes with a clock icon.
frontend/src/components/StudyTimer.tsx: Interactive study timer with start/pause/resume/stop controls that tracks elapsed time for a selected chapter and saves study time to backend when stopped. Resets when chapter selection changes.
frontend/src/components/SubjectCard.tsx: Card component displaying a subject's name, completion percentage, progress bar, and creation date. Fetches subject-specific progress data via query hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, initializing access control with admin token and invalidating dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, subjects, chapters, progress tracking, and study time management with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom warm earth-tone color palette (terracotta, sage, cream) for both light and dark modes, plus typography and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard displaying progress cards, study time, chapter statistics, motivational quotes, and progress reports with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page with Internet Identity authentication button, branded with Tracky logo and error handling for the sign-in flow.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: Profile setup page for new users to enter their email address with validation before accessing the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/SubjectsPage.tsx: React page component for managing subjects with a form to create new subjects and a grid display of existing subjects using SubjectCard components. Includes loading states, error handling, and empty state messaging.
frontend/src/pages/SyllabusTrackerPage.t: React page component for the syllabus tracker that allows users to select a subject, add chapters to it, view chapter lists, and includes StudyTimer and StudyGoalCard components. Handles subject selection and chapter management with loading/error states.
frontend/src/utils/timeFormatters.ts: Utility functions for formatting study time from minutes into readable strings, providing both short format (e.g., '2h 30m') and long format (e.g., '2 hours 30 minutes').
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color palette (including terracotta, sage, cream theme colors), container settings, border radius variables, custom shadows, and accordion animations using OKLCH color space.
project_state.json: Project state document for 'Tracky' student productivity app defining architecture (user auth, subject-chapter hierarchy, study tracking), existing features (dashboard, syllabus tracker, authentication), and design specifications with warm earth tone theme.
